---
title: Installation guide
---

Install sda-cli + prerequisites for submission.

## Required tools and versions

**Minimum versions required:**

- **[sda-cli v0.2.1](https://github.com/NBISweden/sda-cli/releases/tag/v0.2.1)**
- **[s3cmd v2.2.0](https://github.com/s3tools/s3cmd/releases/tag/v2.2.0)**
- **[bigpicture-metadata-interface v2.0.2](https://github.com/imi-bigpicture/bigpicture-metadata-interface/releases/tag/v2.0.2)** *(private repo)*

## More information

- [Dependencies](dependencies.qmd)
- [Installation FAQ](faq.qmd)
